title: Context API & State Batching Mechanics
description: Learn how React shares global states using Context Providers, updates reconciliation nodes, and batches multiple state changes.
learningObjectives: Differentiate between props drilling and Context global providers.
Explain how React context triggers child re-renders.
Understand React state batching and updates queues in React 18+.

quiz.question: Which hook is used to consume global provider data states in React functional components?
What is the primary benefit of React's state batching mechanics?
options: A) It prevents components from rendering altogether
B) It groups multiple state updates to run in a single rendering cycles to improve speed
C) It executes async requests sequentially
D) It creates virtual DOM layouts
quiz.answer: B) It groups multiple state updates to run in a single rendering cycles to improve speed
